verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord, I know the power of the Blood of the lamb; The cleansing flow from calvary to redeem fallen man, Though you were rejected and your love was more than tested, You carried on.

verse.name: v2
v3
verse.lines: Lord your grace is still amazing (3x) Amazing to me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Sometimes our desires may lead us far away, But Your Spirit draws us back to You no matter where we stray; Even in our weakness Lord, Your love can always reach us.
